checks.description: The Cisco switch must not be configured to have any feature enabled that calls home to the vendor.

check.command: show running-config | include "^ no ip arp gratuitous request$"

checks.description: The Cisco switch must be configured to have Gratuitous ARP disabled on all external interfaces.
The Cisco switch must be configured to have IP directed broadcast disabled on all interfaces.
The Cisco switch must be configured to have Internet Control Message Protocol (ICMP) unreachable messages disabled on all external interfaces.
The Cisco switch must be configured to have Internet Control Message Protocol (ICMP) redirect messages disabled on all external interfaces.
The Cisco perimeter switch must be configured to block all packets with any IP options.

check.command: show running-config | include "^ no lldp transmit$"

checks.description: The Cisco perimeter switch must be configured to have Link Layer Discovery Protocol (LLDP) disabled on all external interfaces.
The Cisco perimeter switch must be configured to have Cisco Discovery Protocol (CDP) disabled on all external interfaces.
The Cisco perimeter switch must be configured to have Proxy ARP disabled on all external interfaces.
The Cisco BGP switch must be configured to check whether a single-hop eBGP peer is directly connected.

check.command: show running-config | section "^router bgp" | include "^ no enforce-first-as$"

checks.description: The Cisco BGP switch must be configured to reject route advertisements from BGP peers that do not list their autonomous system (AS) number as the first AS in the AS_PATH attribute.

check.command: show running-config | include "^no mpls ip propagate-ttl$"

checks.description: The Cisco MPLS switch must be configured to have TTL Propagation disabled.

check.command: show running-config | section "^interface " | include "^ storm-control broadcast level "

checks.description: The Cisco PE switch providing Virtual Private LAN Services (VPLS) must be configured to have traffic storm control thresholds on CE-facing interfaces.

check.command: show running-config | include "^ ip verify unicast source reachable-via any$"

checks.description: The Cisco PE switch must be configured with Unicast Reverse Path Forwarding (uRPF) loose mode enabled on all CE-facing interfaces.

expected.substring: ip verify unicast source reachable-via any

checks.description: The Cisco PE switch must be configured to ignore or drop all packets with any IP options.

check.command: show running-config | include "^ ip igmp state-limit "

checks.description: The Cisco multicast Designated switch (DR) must be configured to limit the number of mroute states resulting from Internet Group Management Protocol (IGMP) and Multicast Listener Discovery (MLD) Host Membership Reports.
The Cisco Multicast Source Discovery Protocol (MSDP) switch must be configured to limit the amount of source-active messages it accepts on a per-peer basis.

check.command: show running-config | include "^ ipv6 nd hop-limit 32$"

checks.description: The Cisco switch must be configured to advertise a hop limit of at least 32 in Switch Advertisement messages for IPv6 stateless auto-configuration deployments.
The Cisco switch must not be configured to use IPv6 Site Local Unicast addresses.

check.command: show running-config | include "^ ipv6 nd suppress-ra$"

checks.description: The Cisco perimeter switch must be configured to suppress Router Advertisements on all external IPv6-enabled interfaces.
